type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: MacKay River operating hours (production level) for 2021 operating year was more typical of a normal operating year compared to 2020, which had a 5-month of shutdown period.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Gas sampling process was improved in 2021 and allowed for a highly accurate and monthly gas samples from the fuel gas stream that contain high ppm of sulfur compounds.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: MacKay river had an increase in production level in 2021 v 2020. In addition the gas sampling process was improved to better analyze the sulfur content of the gas.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Decrease is SO2 is due more reliance on sampled sulfur content of gas and less use of backfill methodology in 2024 vs. 2023 operating year.

reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Autres (précisez dans le champ des commentaires)

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: Current operations already maintain CEMS, and ensure annual equipment maintenance, record keeping, and training as previous years.  These activities are not specific to pollution prevention, but without them, this facility would increase its pollution.
